[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000001 1
1 000100000 1
2 000000000 a
3 010000000 1
4 000011000 2
5 000000000 a
6 001111101 6
7 011111101 7

01 10 011111101 7 match 7
12 21 011111111 8
23 32 001101011 5
34 43 000111111 6
45 54 110110111 7
56 65 110111101 7
67 76 011111100 6
70 07 001111101 6 match 6

02 20 001111111 7
13 31 011111101 7 match 7
24 42 001110111 6
35 53 110101001 5
46 64 010111110 6
57 75 111011001 6
60 06 011111101 7 match 7
71 17 011111101 7 match 7

03 30 001111101 6 match 6
14 41 011111111 8
25 52 111000011 5
36 63 010111101 6
47 74 001111110 6
50 05 111111101 8
61 16 011111101 7 match 7
72 27 001011011 5

15 51 111111101 8
26 62 011111111 8
37 73 001111001 5
